name: Pseudo Athena
subtitle: Redacted Timeline
author: Yaj Imagination

pageCount.detail: Including the front page, table of contents, and appendices.

isbn.detail: First book ever made. Not registered.

series.detail: A series of fantasy novels set in the world of Medeana Asperse.

edition.detail: Updated. However, there will be a revamp for the book.

genreSubType.detail: Mediator type. Introspective, idealistic, and value-driven, guided by deep personal beliefs and emotions in decision-making.

themes.detail: Explores the protagonist's journey to find her place in the world and understand her true self.

coreMessage.detail: You don't have to be what others expect you to be to still matter. Worthiness isn't inherited, it's lived through your choices, especially the hard ones.

storyFocus.detail: The journey where she finds acceptance and realizes her true potential doesn't come from other but herself.

tone.detail: The narrative maintains a primarily lighthearted and self-aware tone, with humor conveyed through Dea`s sarcastic perspective. It periodically shifts into more emotionally intense and serious territory. Comedy and grief are often interwoven, sometimes within the same passage, which contributes to the overall emotional depth and effectiveness of the story

narrativeType.detail: Prefers casual interactions and open communication.

synopsis:
The daughter of Athena, but none of her divine gifts. 
 Hunted, alone, and desperate, Medeana must outrun her past and survive a world that wants her dead.
 Gods are watching.
 Enemies are closing in.
 And destiny is far more dangerous than she ever imagined.
authorsInsight: This needs further revision and editing. But I'll leave it published for now. I want to share the story as soon as possible, and I want to see how readers will react to it. After a couple of readers review on my end, I decided to change and revise the original edition. I'll be posting the revised/revamped version soon.
notes: After a couple of readers review on my end, I decided to change and revise the original edition. I'll be posting the revised/revamped version soon.
